response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a Director-level IC with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. Resume shows roughly 10-13 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, no advanced degree, and only recent, peripheral exposure to AI-agent tooling. Profile is well below the Principal/Director bar for an AI Strategy role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative
Active community contributor with workshops, talks, and OSS libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise required for the role
Experience level and scope are senior IC, not Director/Principal-level technical leadership
Limited cloud-platform depth; AWS exposure is narrow and no GCP/Azure platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: Seniority mismatch vs. Director-level IC bar
